name: docker-quick
description: Docker / container diagnostic playbook. Use when the user reports container issues — Exited (137), OOM, restart loops, image bloat, layer cache misses, Compose service unhealthy, port already in use, mount failures. Read-only inspect via docker/podman/compose; remote hosts go through ssh-core. Skip for Kubernetes Pods (use k8s-debug) and skip for general host issues (use remote-debug).
